title: Verify flight details are displayed correctly
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the flight itinerary screen. | Verify the departure city is displayed as 'Aalborg'. | Verify the destination city is displayed as 'Abu Dhabi'. | Verify the flight title is displayed as 'AAL - AUH 05 Jan, Thu'. | Verify the flight duration is displayed as '11h 25m 2 stop'. | Verify the first flight route is displayed as 'AAL (Aalborg) to CPH (Kastrup)'. | Verify the first flight departure time is displayed as '10:30'. | Verify the first flight arrival time is displayed as '11:10'. | Verify the first flight stop duration is displayed as '1h 15m in Copenhagen, Denmark'. | Verify the second flight route is displayed as 'CPH (Kastrup) to IST (Ataturk)'. | Verify the second flight departure time is displayed as '12:25'. | Verify the second flight arrival time is displayed as '17:40'. | Verify the second flight stop duration is displayed as '1h 35m in Istanbul'.
expected_result: All flight details are displayed correctly. | No errors or missing information.

title: Verify navigation to the previous screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the flight itinerary screen. | Tap the back arrow in the header to navigate to the previous screen.
expected_result: Navigation to the previous screen is successful.

title: Verify navigation to the next screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the flight itinerary screen. | Tap the forward arrow in the header to navigate to the next screen.
expected_result: Navigation to the next screen is successful.

title: Verify flight details are displayed correctly in different languages
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the flight itinerary screen. | Change the app language to a different language. | Verify the flight details are displayed correctly in the new language.
expected_result: Flight details are displayed correctly in the new language.

title: Verify flight details are displayed correctly after device rotation
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the flight itinerary screen. | Rotate the device. | Verify the flight details are displayed correctly after device rotation.
expected_result: Flight details are displayed correctly after device rotation.

title: Verify flight details are displayed correctly after app restart
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the flight itinerary screen. | Restart the app. | Verify the flight details are displayed correctly after app restart.
expected_result: Flight details are displayed correctly after app restart.

title: Verify flight details are displayed correctly after app update
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the flight itinerary screen. | Update the app. | Verify the flight details are displayed correctly after app update.
expected_result: Flight details are displayed correctly after app update.
